seo_title: Current Time in San Antonio — CST/CDT
seo_description: Current time in San Antonio, Texas — live Central Time (CST/CDT) clock, DST schedule, and time differences with major US and world cities.

faq.question: What time is it in San Antonio right now?
faq.answer: San Antonio, Texas, USA uses Central Standard Time (CST, UTC-6) in winter and Central Daylight Time (CDT, UTC-5) during Daylight Saving Time in summer. The IANA identifier is America/Chicago. Clocks spring forward on the second Sunday in March and fall back on the first Sunday in November. San Antonio shares its time zone with Dallas, Houston, Chicago, and New Orleans. The IANA timezone identifier is America/Chicago.

faq.question: What time zone is San Antonio in?
faq.answer: San Antonio is in the Central Time Zone (CT), observing CST (UTC-6) from November to March and CDT (UTC-5) from March to November. All major Texas cities (Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio) are in the Central Time Zone. The IANA identifier is America/Chicago.

faq.question: Does San Antonio observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. San Antonio observes Daylight Saving Time. Clocks spring forward 1 hour on the second Sunday in March at 2:00 AM (becoming 3:00 AM CDT, UTC-5) and fall back on the first Sunday in November at 2:00 AM (becoming 1:00 AM CST, UTC-6). Texas follows federal DST rules under the Uniform Time Act of 1966.

faq.question: What is the time difference between San Antonio and New York?
faq.answer: San Antonio (CST, UTC-6) is 1 hour behind New York (EST, UTC-5) year-round. Both cities observe Daylight Saving Time on the same schedule, so the 1-hour gap is constant. When it is 9:00 AM in San Antonio, it is 10:00 AM in New York.

faq.question: What is the time difference between San Antonio and Los Angeles?
faq.answer: San Antonio (CST, UTC-6) is 2 hours ahead of Los Angeles (PST, UTC-8) year-round. Both cities observe Daylight Saving Time on the same schedule, so the 2-hour gap is constant. When it is 9:00 AM in Los Angeles, it is 11:00 AM in San Antonio.

faq.question: What is the time difference between San Antonio and London?
faq.answer: San Antonio (CST, UTC-6) is 6 hours behind London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During US and UK Daylight Saving Time, San Antonio (CDT, UTC-5) and London (BST, UTC+1) maintain the 6-hour gap. Brief windows in spring and autumn may shift this to 5 or 7 hours.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in San Antonio?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in San Antonio are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST/CDT, Monday through Friday. San Antonio is Texas's second-largest city and a major center for military, healthcare, tourism, and financial services. It is home to several large US military installations (Fort Sam Houston, Lackland AFB, Randolph AFB) and Valero Energy, one of the largest Fortune 500 companies. The River Walk attracts millions of visitors annually.
